[30;1m313 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m314 | [0m[35m- name(string|array|function): mandatory.[0m
[30;1m315 | [0m[35m	- If string, the name of the type you want to inject.[0m

[30;1m318 | [0m[35m[0m
